lesson_title: Critical Synthesis and Expert Production: Speaking Lesson 5
learning_objective: Learners can critique, refine, interpret nuance and produce expert-level responses in a speaking task about persuasion.
cefr_outcome: Learners can understand virtually everything heard or read and express themselves precisely in complex situations.
learner_facing_explanation: In this lesson you will practise speaking for critical synthesis and expert production. You will learn useful language connected to persuasion and practise subtle modality. By the end, you should be able to complete a short real-life task and explain your answer clearly at C2 level.
complete_teaching_input: Focus language: subtle modality. Vocabulary theme: persuasion. The teacher introduces the target language in a meaningful context, models pronunciation and form, checks meaning with concept questions, and moves learners from controlled practice to freer use. At C2, learners should critique, refine, interpret nuance and produce expert-level responses with increasing independence. The lesson should use board examples, short teacher modelling, pair practice, feedback and a final communicative task.
examples: Example 1: I can use subtle modality to talk about persuasion.
Example 2: The learner gives a C2 answer with clear meaning and correct key language.
Example 3: The learner checks, improves and repeats the answer after feedback.
Example 4: The learner uses one linking phrase or support phrase suitable for C2.

interactive_practice.prompt: Choose the best sentence using subtle modality.
options: Correct use of subtle modality in a C2 sentence.
Incorrect word order with subtle modality.
interactive_practice.feedback_correct: Correct. The sentence uses subtle modality accurately.
interactive_practice.feedback_incorrect: Check the form and meaning of subtle modality.

interactive_practice.prompt: Match the persuasion phrase to its meaning.
interactive_practice.feedback_correct: Good matching. You understand the phrase meaning.
interactive_practice.feedback_incorrect: Look again at the context and key words.

interactive_practice.prompt: Build a complete answer for the lesson task.
interactive_practice.model_answer: I can explain my idea clearly because I understand persuasion.
interactive_practice.feedback_correct: Well done. Your sentence is complete and meaningful.
interactive_practice.feedback_incorrect: Check that your sentence has a subject, verb and clear meaning.

correct_answers.P3: I can explain my idea clearly because I understand persuasion.

instant_feedback.correct: Correct. Continue to the next step.
instant_feedback.partly_correct: Good start. Check accuracy and add one more detail.
instant_feedback.incorrect: Try again. Review the model and look at the key language.

teacher_notes: Begin with a quick diagnostic question. Model the target form subtle modality. Use choral repetition if pronunciation is important. Monitor pair work and record three common errors. Finish with delayed correction and one confidence-building success point.
homework_task: Write or record five sentences about persuasion using language from this lesson.

assessment_task.task_title: C2 Speaking Check - Critical Synthesis and Expert Production
assessment_task.instructions: Complete a short speaking task using subtle modality and vocabulary from persuasion.
success_criteria: Uses subtle modality with reasonable accuracy
Responds at the expected CEFR level

criteria.name: Language control
criteria.descriptor: Uses subtle modality and sentence structure accurately.

criteria.name: Vocabulary range
criteria.descriptor: Uses appropriate words connected to persuasion.

criteria.name: Fluency/coherence
criteria.descriptor: Organises ideas clearly for the level.

speaking_task: Speak for 60-120 seconds about persuasion. Use at least two examples and one reason.
writing_task: Write a short C2 response about persuasion. Include the target language: subtle modality.

listening_audio.script: Audio script for C2-M05-L05. Speaker one: Today we are practising persuasion. Speaker two: I need to use subtle modality correctly. Speaker one: Listen carefully and choose the answer that best matches the meaning.

visual_activity_cards.title: Subtle Modality form
